description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds a Linux binary on x86-64 architecture when code is pushed to the qt6 branch or manually dispatched. The workflow uses an ubuntu-20.04 environment, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.13, upgrades pip, installs Qt 6.7.3, and installs Python dependencies including Cython, ninja, and PyQt6. It then builds extensions with python setup.py and creates a Linux binary using pyinstaller, finally uploading the artifact to GitHub.
